column1: Table Title: Retail Sales Index, (2025 = 100), At Current Prices, Monthly

Retail sales refer to the sale of consumer goods to the public for personal or household consumption. Link to latest RSI/FSI release is available via https://www.singstat.gov.sg/find-data/explore-data-themes/industry/services/latest-news-data. Relevant methodology paper is available via https://www.singstat.gov.sg/find-data/explore-data-themes/industry/services/related-information
Refers to retail stores which sell food & beverages that are generally not meant for immediate consumption within their premises.

The Retail Sales Index (RSI) measures the short-term performance of the Retail Trade industry based on the sales records of Retail Trade establishments. The base year for the indices is 2025. The RSI is available at current prices and in chained volume terms. The indices at current prices measure the change in sales values which can result from changes in both price and quantity, while the indices in chained volume terms measure the change in the volume of economic activity by removing the price effect.
na   not available or not applicable
-     nil or negligible or not significant
Numbers may not add up to the totals due to rounding.
Data are the latest available at the time of access or download. Some statistics, particularly those for the most recent time periods, are provisional and may be subject to revision at a later date.
Values are shown in Singapore dollars (unless otherwise specified).
